message:
fix: remove unused imports and improve hook implementations

- Remove unused `useRef` import from landing page
- Remove unused `useCallback` import from useScrollReveal hook
- Fix TypeScript error in useReducedMotion by removing deprecated Safari fallback
- Improve useScrollReveal with cleaner shouldShowImmediately logic
- Various linter auto-fixes in wizard pages
